caption: A nighttime scene features a large, brightly lit lantern display, including a multi-tiered pagoda and a large golden tiger figure against a backdrop of blue and green decorative structures. The VOA Learning English logo and the text "AP" appear in the top left corner of the image. At the bottom, the caption "2022 marks the Year of the Tiger." is displayed. Several people are visible as dark silhouettes in the foreground, observing the elaborate lights. As the sequence progresses, the silhouettes of the people shift slightly as they move through the space. Specifically, a figure on the left moves out of the frame, while others adjust their positions near the center and right side of the display. The lighting and the structures remain static, while the human movement provides the only change in the scene.
